name: PiXity
summary: Real-time tourism chatbot for Da Nang integrating transport, weather, and event APIs.

name: Lock-Time Wallet
summary: A blockchain-based lock-time wallet that allows users to lock their funds for a specified period of time.

name: MagiCV
summary: AI-powered CV builder designed for digital nomads. Create stunning, job-specific resumes that land you remote opportunities worldwide.

name: MCP - Crawler
summary: AI-powered website data collection tool - MCP Tools (Bypass banned bots and captchas)

name: Woman Day
summary: A romantic gift website for International Women's Day featuring high-quality UI effects, a gallery, letters, canvas snow, and a music player.

name: LocalMate
summary: A multi-modal travel assistant and contextual agent API for Da Nang city, featuring itinerary planning and AI-powered local recommendations.

name: Lab Management
summary: A professional laboratory management dashboard providing real-time monitoring of occupancy, entry/exit counts, and video analytics.

name: Medagen
summary: Medagen is an AI-powered patient triage assistant utilizing LangChain ReAct Agent and Gemini 2.5Flash, integrated with Computer Vision and RAG for safe medical recommendations.

name: MathSolver
summary: Hệ thống giải toán hình học và trực quan hóa kiến thức thông qua AI Multi-Agent, hỗ trợ giải bài tập từ hình ảnh (OCR) và tạo minh họa chuyển động bằng video tự động với Manim.
